creator: freebsd@luna.afraid.org
text:
Unless someone is willing to mirror the distfile i cannot resolve
you problem.

In the meantime you can try these DNS-Servers:

217.146.139.5 (NS1.DE.EU.ORSN.NET)
62.157.101.211 (RESOLVER.DATA-UNION.NET)

These are public nameservers and both resolve raaf.atspace.org fine.
